name: Lady Dracula's Mansion
short_description: Explore a creepy gothic mansion and survive the night while being hunted down by a lady dracula! Lady Dracula's Mansion is an FPS horror game with retro graphics where you must sneak around and use your wits while scavenging whatever weapons and resources you can find to help you survive.
detailed_description:
Lady Dracula's Mansion is a retro-inspired short indie horror FPS experience where you must use your wits to take on the most dangerous of enemies: a hungry lady dracula! Step inside a sprawling Victorian mansion, then proceed to rummage through all the cabinets and other assorted furniture pieces for whatever items might aid you in your quest to face off against a feisty fanged foe from your fiercest nightmares. Will you manage to survive the night, or will you be dinner?

Watch out, this girl bites!
